name: How to Contact Google Business Support
description: Learn how to contact Google Com Business support to access help with issues or questions about your account.
main_title: Get Support for Google My Business
richtext:
‍

Google My Business (GMB) is a premium option for business owners that want to develop an online presence for their venture. With GMB, businesses claim their Google listing and then add to it so that consumers can find the company easily when conducting a search online. When it comes to building your account, the process is pretty simple. However, from time to time, you may need assistance. 

The GMB help center is a valuable tool, but sometimes you need additional support. If you have tried to contact Google My Business support in the past, you already know the process is difficult. There are no telephone numbers to use or direct contact methods. 

Below is a short guide to help you contact support at GMB. Follow these steps to see results in a day or two, depending on the contact method. 

Step 1: 

First, you need to go to the Google My Business Help Center. You can reach the Help Center here: https://support.google.com/business#topic=4539639

Once here, you need to sign in, if you are not signed in already.

Sign in to your Google My Business account to access help options

Scroll down to the bottom of the page and click on Contact Us.

Choose the "Contact Us" option at the bottom of the page

Step 2: 

Next, you need to fill in the boxes within the support section.

Describe your issue in the box provided

‍

Type in “Customer Support”. From the results, select OTHER. Then click Next Step.

Choose "Other" and click "Next"

Next, you will select email. Send an email to support with the exact details of your problem or question. Support will take a few days to get back to you.

Choose the email option and describe the exact details of your issue or question

Step 3: 

You can also use social media sites to contact GMB support. Google My Business has a Facebook and Twitter page. 

https://www.facebook.com/GoogleMyBusiness/

On the Facebook page, you can send a message or type in the Create Post section for guidance. 

https://twitter.com/googlemybiz

On Twitter, you can @ the page for assistance or comment on an existing post. 

The social media sites may not result in quick communication, but it is two alternatives you can use to reach support for your account.
join_title: Spend More Time Running Your Business
join_description: And, less time obsessing about your local presence
